Sources.Title: Nutrition with Judy — Blood Test Results: 6+ Years Carnivore

TranscriptionNotes: The official video visibly presents Judy Cho's original Labcorp report for the 12 April 2022 collection. The report states age 40; its exact birth month and day are deliberately covered, so this profile preserves the stated age and does not infer or republish a date of birth.

The source reports quantitative CRP as below 1 mg/L. The stored value is the published assay limit, following the World Cup detection-limit rule; it is not presented as an exact measured concentration.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
